item.title: Scientists develop first-of-its-kind antibody to block Epstein Barr virus
item.description: Fred Hutch Cancer Center scientists reached a crucial milestone in blocking Epstein Barr virus (EBV), a pathogen estimated to infect 95% of the global...

item.title: Abortion restrictions increase deaths among expecting and new moms, researchers report
item.description: Anti-abortion laws are associated with more deaths among expecting and new mothers, a new study says.

item.title: Overlooked Aeromonas emerges as a leading cause of gastro illness in Australia
item.description: Most bacterial gastrointestinal illnesses in Australia are thought to be caused by two pathogens, Campylobacter and Salmonella. But an emerging pathog...

item.title: Oxytocin reverses anxiety-like behavior after three months of isolation in mice
item.description: Periods of prolonged social isolation have long been associated with difficult emotions and, in some cases, with the emergence of psychiatric symptoms...

item.title: Child vaccination rates are falling fast, with some regions barely reaching 80%
item.description: Child vaccination has been one of Australia's biggest success stories. Before the COVID pandemic, we hit the national target of 95% of one-year-olds f...
